next_step: use this frozen test result as the HHAR FedAvg baseline; do not retune FedAvg from test performance

physical_user_bootstrap.score: balanced supported-class Macro-F1 over all 15 cells

physical_user_bootstrap.interval: 2.5th and 97.5th percentile of resampled user means
physical_user_bootstrap.score_per_user: Balanced mean supported-class Macro-F1 over all 15 cells.

primary_analysis.confirmatory_estimate: Report the mean and sample SD across the four confirmatory model-seed marginals, excluding development seed 20260615.
primary_analysis.factor_decomposition: Descriptive balanced 3x5 two-way sums-of-squares decomposition for test Macro-F1; no p-values.
primary_analysis.model_seed_marginal: For each of five model seeds, average the three split-seed test scores; report the mean, sample SD, and range across those five model-seed marginals.
primary_analysis.primary_metric: test global Macro-F1 over all six classes
primary_analysis.prohibited_summary: Do not report a pooled 15-cell SD as model-seed or split-seed uncertainty.
primary_analysis.split_seed_marginal: For each of three split seeds, average five model-seed test scores; report split marginal sample SD and range separately.

secondary_analysis.confusion: Average the row-normalized six-class confusion matrices equally over all 15 cells.
secondary_analysis.per_activity: Precision, recall, F1, and support for each of six activities; average splits within each model seed before reporting model-seed mean, sample SD, and range.
secondary_analysis.per_device: Supported-class Macro-F1 per device; average splits within model seed, then report five-model-seed mean, sample SD, and range.
secondary_analysis.per_physical_user: Supported-class Macro-F1 per physical user using physical user as the independent reporting unit; user-device pairs are descriptive.
secondary_analysis.validation_to_test_gap: Test Macro-F1 minus the already frozen validation Macro-F1 for each matching checkpoint, summarized by model-seed marginals.

pre_registration.stop_rule: This is the first and final locked-test evaluation for the frozen HHAR FedAvg baseline. Evaluate every registered checkpoint once, publish all cells, and perform no post-test retuning or seed selection.

two_way_test_decomposition.method: balanced 3x5 descriptive decomposition without replicated cells; interaction is residual and no inferential test is performed
